steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships on the figure first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Count the sides
steps.content: The triangle has one side of length $x$ and two sides of length $y$.

steps.title: Write the perimeter equation
steps.content: The perimeter is the sum of all three side lengths: $$x+y+y=47$$ $$x+2y=47$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice B — $x+2y=47$ is $x+2y=47$, which counts one $x$-side and two $y$-sides. B.
